title: magnolia fraseri var. pyramidata
intro: Magnolia fraseri var. pyramidata, also known as Fraser's magnolia, is a variety of the Fraser magnolia tree that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Magnolia fraseri var. pyramidata are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as providing relief from headaches and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by steaming the bark, leaves, or roots to produce a medicinal tea, although it can also be used in tinctures and salves.
